name: Unix Shell Suspicious Command Chaining
description: Detects suspicious command chaining in Unix shells indicative of post-exploitation
query:
// Detect chained reconnaissance commands on Unix
// Trigger on shell with multiple piped commands
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)(bash|sh|zsh|ksh|dash)$"
  and cmdline matches "(whoami|id|uname|ifconfig|ip\s+a|cat\s+/etc/passwd|cat\s+/etc/shadow|awk|curl|wget).*\|"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 3
within 120 seconds
